chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett. No.D-2137 of 2024 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For hearing of main case 18.09.2025 Mr. Muhammad Hamzo Buriro, Advocate/petitioner No.2 Mr. Shahryar I Awan, Assistant Advocate General ************** Mr. Sanwan Khan Jagirani, Advocate, has filed vakalatnama on behalf of the respondent No.3, same is taken on record. He has also filed a statement along with certain documents, which is likewise taken on record. A copy thereof has been provided to petitioner No.2, who, after going through the same, seeks disposal of the instant petition and requests that the respondent be directed to provide water as per the share list. In view of the said statement, the present petition stands disposed of accordingly. J U D G E J U D G E M. Ali*
